attach_shape: three-sided (card frontmatter characters: pointer + card body ## Connections wikilink + cohort appears_on: + cohort ## Appears on auto-gen regen)
wave201_continuity: Subtype typology corrected in eldrazi.md body wave 201 (Drone 71 / Processor 11 creature cards + Scion / Spawn token-only); wave 203 attaches the four BFZ-block cards whose type-lines instantiate that typology cleanly.

accepted.archetype_slot: Scion-token-generator at the spell tier (parallel branch to Drone-tier Scion-generators like Skyspawner)
accepted.scryfall_type_line_basis: Instant — type_line is Instant (not Eldrazi-typed creature); generates Eldrazi Scion token via oracle text
bullet_anchor_quotes: 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token. It has "Sacrifice this token: Add {C}." — Scryfall BFZ-54 oracle_text

accepted.archetype_slot: Drone-tier Ingest-source (load-bearing first half of BFZ-block design loop)
accepted.scryfall_type_line_basis: Creature — Eldrazi Drone (one of 71 Drone-typed creature cards per cohort-body typology)
bullet_anchor_quotes: Ingest (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.) — Scryfall BFZ-55 oracle_text
citations: cohort node: BFZ-block design signature paragraph

accepted.archetype_slot: Processor-tier exile-consumer (load-bearing second half of BFZ-block design loop; closes the Ingest loop)
accepted.scryfall_type_line_basis: Creature — Eldrazi Processor (one of 11 Processor-typed creature cards, BFZ-block almost exclusively)
bullet_anchor_quotes: {2}{U}, Put a card an opponent owns from exile into that player's graveyard: Tap target creature. — Scryfall BFZ-56 oracle_text
The seas are no less imperiled than the dry lands. This fight is mine as much as it is yours. — Scryfall BFZ-56 flavor_text (speaker: Kiora to Gideon Jura)
citations: cohort node: brood-lineage taxonomy + BFZ-block design signature

accepted.archetype_slot: Drone-tier Scion-generator (parallel branch to Drone-tier Ingest-source like Benthic Infiltrator); occupies airborne slot of BFZ Drone roster
accepted.scryfall_type_line_basis: Creature — Eldrazi Drone (one of 71 Drone-typed creature cards per cohort-body typology)
bullet_anchor_quotes: a 1/1 colorless Eldrazi Scion creature token. It has "Sacrifice this token: Add {C}." — Scryfall BFZ-58 oracle_text
citations: cohort node: scale-gradient design signature paragraph

cohort_body_cleanups.before_lead: BFZ/OGW Eldrazi coverage in current corpus is exhaustive at the common-and-uncommon Eldrazi-depicting-or-Eldrazi-referenced slice post wave 41 enrichment.
cohort_body_cleanups.after_lead: BFZ/OGW Eldrazi coverage in current corpus is now substantively widened to the brood-lineage feeding-apparatus tier post wave 203 attach.
cohort_body_cleanups.design_loop_coverage_note: BFZ-54/55/56/58 collectively cover the complete BFZ-block Drone-Ingest → Processor-consumption design loop described in the typology paragraph: Drone Ingest (BFZ-55 Benthic Infiltrator) → exile accumulates → Processor consumes (BFZ-56 Cryptic Cruiser) for tempo, with Scion-generation as the parallel Drone-tier branch (BFZ-58 Skyspawner at the creature level, BFZ-54 Adverse Conditions at the spell level).

anti-confab_self_check.comment: Drone / Processor / Scion-token tiers are verbatim from the cohort body's typology paragraph (line 56); BFZ-block design loop (Drone Ingest → exile → Processor consumes) is verbatim from line 89 of cohort body. No new synthesis introduced.
